# Electromagnetic Corrosion Logs

**Summary**: Tools used to measure the thickness of casing and tubing in wellbores to identify corrosion and metal loss.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-al-ajmi|Al-Ajmi, 2017]] used electromagnetic corrosion logs (EMDS, EMIT) to detect metal loss and quantify casing integrity.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Data from 208 wells were analyzed using these tools to determine corrosion growth rates and thickness losses across three strings. ([[2017-al-ajmi|Al-Ajmi, 2017, p. 85]])
